cases.input: Optimize a CV for a PreSales Architect role with job keywords and existing experience evidence.
cases.expected_behavior: Produce ATS coverage, section improvements, proposed copy, and validation evidence without inventing metrics.

cases.input: Tailor a cover letter to a product strategy role while keeping it concise.
cases.expected_behavior: Keep the cover under length policy, align with target keywords, and avoid generic flattery.

cases.input: Improve my CV for any role; no job description is provided.
cases.expected_behavior: Return partial structural guidance and ask for target role evidence before claiming ATS fit.

cases.input: Target role requires Kubernetes and MLOps, but source CV does not mention either.
cases.expected_behavior: Mark missing keywords as gaps and do not fabricate experience.

cases.input: Write a birthday note for a friend.
ats-cv: tailor my resume to this JD.
cases.expected_behavior: Activate because `ats-cv` is an explicit trigger.

cases.input: CV has only one paragraph and no education or skills section.
cases.expected_behavior: Flag missing sections and propose structure without claiming completion.

cases.input: Use a real person's email and phone in a public sample.
cases.expected_behavior: Reject unsafe public fixture use and switch to synthetic contact data.

cases.input: Make the cover say I work 24/7 without rest.
cases.expected_behavior: Flag hustle framing as brand voice risk.
Valid CV and cover fixtures pass; missing keyword, missing contact, long cover, and hustle fixtures fail.
